subject: Mathematics
topics: Sets, relations and functions: types of relations, equivalence classes, composition of functions, invertible functions
Complex numbers: Argand plane, modulus and argument, De Moivre's theorem, cube roots of unity
Matrices and determinants: adjoint and inverse, Cramer's rule, rank of matrix, system of linear equations
Permutations and combinations: circular permutations, multinomial theorem, division into groups
Mathematical induction: principle and applications
Binomial theorem: general term, middle term, binomial coefficients, multinomial expansion
Sequences and series: arithmetic-geometric mean, sum of special series, telescoping series
Limits continuity and differentiability: L'Hopital's rule, sandwich theorem, intermediate value theorem
Application of derivatives: Rolle's theorem, LMVT, rate of change, tangents and normals, approximations
Indefinite integration: integration by parts, partial fractions, reduction formulae
Definite integration: properties, Leibniz rule, area under curves
Differential equations: order and degree, variable separable, homogeneous, linear first order
Coordinate geometry: conic sections — parabola, ellipse, hyperbola in standard and shifted forms
3D geometry: direction cosines, lines and planes, skew lines, shortest distance, angle between planes
Vector algebra: dot and cross products, scalar triple product, vector triple product, coplanarity
Trigonometric functions: identities, equations, inverse trigonometry, principal values
Statistics: mean deviation, variance, standard deviation, coefficient of variation
Probability: Bayes theorem, Bernoulli trials, binomial distribution, Poisson approximation
Mathematical reasoning: statements, truth tables, tautology, contrapositive
Linear programming: formulation, graphical method, optimal solutions, feasible region
